title: Separate Board Edit and View Permissions
excerpt: I would like for the ability to grant view and edit permissions on a board to only specified account members and guests. I want only certain members to be able to edit items and everyone else (with permission to the boar…

posts.author: vjones (Vernon Jones)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like for the ability to grant view and edit permissions on a board to only specified account members and guests. I want only certain members to be able to edit items and everyone else (with permission to the board) to view items.

Essentially, boards would have 3 high-levels of permissions: Own, Edit, View.

(I’m on the Enterprise plan.)
